name: TA-65 metabolic syndrome terminated registry
summary: Terminated randomized double-masked crossover phase 1 TA-65 registry in metabolic syndrome or insulin resistance, with plasma insulin as the primary outcome.
population: 13 adults aged 35 to 70 years with metabolic syndrome or insulin resistance

trial_details.watch_status_reason: Registry text records actual completion in June 2014 and later termination, with no posted results in the June 15, 2026 API check; keep as late_no_results until a final retirement sweep decides archive status.
trial_details.expected_results_window: ClinicalTrials.gov lists actual primary and study completion in June 2014, then termination with 13 enrolled participants and no posted results in the June 15, 2026 API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: The terminated no-results status is limiting context for the TA-65 clinical record.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Termination and small enrollment reduce the chance that this registry will supply interpretable human telomerase-restoration evidence.
